ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who wrote the article */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the article */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views the article has received */,
  "views_today" INTEGER /* Number of views the article received today */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., serial story, one-off article, user guide) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was first created */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary or abstract of the article */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured on the platform */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, read) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the article */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., search engine, direct, other website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, editor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended article */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tag (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tag_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES article_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tag_mapping_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment if the comment is a reply */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, hidden, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES article_comments ("comment_id")
)
